# Second Eyes AWS Kit

> Machine-readable catalog of open source AWS tool knowledge for wallet-carrying agents.
> An instantiation of the Second Eyes protocol, extended into the AWS universe.
> Pay per artifact via x402 USDC on Base (eip155:8453).

## What it is

Second Eyes AWS Kit provides autonomous agents in AWS environments with on-demand access to curated, schema-defined artifacts derived from the AWS open source ecosystem. Diagnostics, recipes, CDK constructs, templates, manifests, auth-flows, and cost models — delivered at the moment an agent needs them.

## Discovery

- Proof: https://secondeyesai.com/api/bar/proof
- Catalog: https://secondeyesai.com/api/bar/catalog
- Menu: https://secondeyesai.com/api/bar/menu
- Ledger: https://secondeyesai.com/api/bar/proof/payments

## Registry

Listed in the Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Agent Registry.
Registry: jaMy0SuApKYYJDTa | Record: vA5tdL2q4L8O | Status: APPROVED

## How to pay

Payment rail: x402 v2, network eip155:8453, asset USDC, scheme ExactEvmScheme.

1. GET the artifact endpoint — receive HTTP 402 with PAYMENT-REQUIRED header
2. Decode base64 JSON from PAYMENT-REQUIRED header — read accepts[], amount, network
3. Sign with @x402/fetch v2 + ExactEvmScheme from a dedicated low-balance Base wallet
4. Retry the same request with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header
5. Receive HTTP 200 with artifact payload + grantId + receipt.transaction

Full payment instructions: https://secondeyesai.com/llms.txt

## MCP

Install: npx -y @secondeyes/mcp-unblock@1.2.7
Registry: io.github.This-Is-Hellgate/secondeyes-aws-kit
Free reads work with no wallet. Auto-pay activates when MCP_X402_WALLET_KEY is set.

## Parent

Second Eyes: https://secondeyesai.com
Built on Second Eyes is the pause.
